relations.note: Radius invariant refines the general button style spec and takes precedence: it must persist unchanged even when the background image is skipped.
Background asset handling and overall section layout describe the same composed banner and are applied together.

quotes: A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.

rules.intent: Preserve the fixed composition of the signature gradient CTA banner across every instance.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA Section is a full-width banner where a headline and a single button are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked, with section padding of 48px 25px 56px 25px (padding.gradient_cta.section).
rules.snippets: <mj-section background-url="...Gradient_callout.png" background-size="cover" background-repeat="no-repeat" background-position="center center" background-color="#faa31b" padding="48px 25px 56px 25px"> ... </mj-section>

quotes: Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback
the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px)

asset is `https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png` — do not re-host or recolor

If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Guarantee the gradient banner degrades gracefully without losing brand color identity when images are unavailable.
rules.rule_text: The section background uses the branded gradient PNG (Gradient_callout.png) sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the 600px content width; it must never be re-hosted or recolored. A solid Sunshine (#faa31b) background-color must always be set as a fallback since some clients (e.g., Outlook) drop background images. The image may be skipped only in very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, image-stripping clients, hard size budgets); when skipped, remove only background-url/size/repeat/position — the Sunshine fallback color, headline color, button color, and button radius must remain exactly as specified.

quotes: this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Protect the signature button shape as an unalterable brand identifier.
rules.rule_text: The gradient CTA button's signature asymmetric radius (49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px) is mandatory on every instance, even when the background image is skipped. It must never be simplified to a single value, have corners swapped, or decimals rounded.

quotes: Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

rules.intent: Ensure the headline remains legible and consistently positioned atop the gradient banner.
rules.rule_text: The gradient CTA headline is Brand Blue (#00529b), centered, positioned in the top third of the section above the button, set in Nunito Sans ExtraBold (weight 800) at ~28px, kept to one line, with 32px of bottom padding before the button.

quotes: Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces.

**Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

rules.intent: Keep the CTA button's color, label treatment, and arrow accent consistent with the brand's signature gradient CTA device.
rules.rule_text: The gradient CTA button sits centered in the lower-middle of the section, below the headline. It uses a Deep Blue (#003D74) fill, a white label in Nunito Sans ExtraBold at 18px, and a Gold (#FFC20E) arrow (›, 24px) that follows two non-breaking spaces after the label text. Button size is fixed at 248 × 64px.
